## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 122]
- App Version: [e.g. 2.1.0]

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
